description.en: The origin of Tainan's maritime faith, dedicated to Mazu as protector of seafarers. A key source of Taiwan's Mazu worship, witnessing centuries of fishermen and merchants praying before setting sail.
description.zh: 台南海港信仰的起源地，供奉媽祖庇護出海商旅。此廟是台灣媽祖信仰的重要源頭，見證數百年來漁民與商人出海前的祈安儀式，至今香火不斷。

title.en: From Sea Protection to City Beliefs
title.zh: 從海港守護到城市信仰
